name: Blue Cheese Salad Dressing
directions: Using an electric mixer, add ingredients in order and blend well.
Bottle and refrigerate.

name: Thyme and Garlic Cheese Dip
directions: Blend first 4 ingredients in processor until garlic is finely chopped, occasionally scraping down sides of bowl.
Add cheese and sour cream; blend well.
Season with more salt and pepper, if desired.
Transfer to serving bowl; chill 30 minutes (Dip can be made up to 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.).

name: Orange Froth
directions: beat cheese and gelatin together.
fold in whip topping and oranges.
make sure they are well blended.
put into serving bowl.
let sit over night in fridge.

name: Mediterranean Layered Dip
directions: Combine cream cheese and miracle whip.
Spread on bottom of 9 inch pie plate.
Top with tomatoes cucumbers and olives.
Sprinkle with cheese.
Serve with wedges of pita bread.

name: Creamy Tortilla Roll Ups
directions: Mix cream cheese and garlic powder until blended.
Spread each tortilla with a thin layer of refried beans.
Spread cream cheese over beans, top with cilantro leaves.
Roll up tightly.
Refrigerate 30 minute.
Cut into 1/2 inch slices.
Serve with salsa.

name: Best Ever Cheese Ball
directions: Let the cream cheese soften a bit on the counter.
Chop green pepper and green onion as fine as possible.
Drain pineapple repeatedly (the more moisture you can get out of it the better your cheeseball will form).
Combine all ingredients in small bowl.
Chill for 1/2 hour.
Form into a ball and, if desired, roll in chopped pecans.
Chill until ready to serve.

name: Beer Dip
directions: Soften cream cheese at room temperature for about an hour and a half.
Mix all ingredients in a large bowl that can be covered.
Mix until well blended (I suggest not using a blender or any other kind of mixing device, just a spoon).
Mixture might seem a little watery but it will thicken the longer it is in the refrigerator.
Let mixture sit in refrigerator covered for a couple of hours.
Stir mixture, and serve with pretzels or chips.

name: Pasta with no-cook Cream Sauce
directions: Mix chopped tomatoesCream Cheese, cubed; 3/4 cup olive oil, chopped fresh basil leaves, red wine vinegar, 2 garlic cloves and salt and ground black pepper in large bowl.
Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Cook pasta as directed on package; drain.
Place in large bowl Add tomato mixture and 1/2 cup toasted pine nuts; toss lightly.

name: Mozzarella Cheese Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients and chill.
Serve with vegetables, chips or crackers.

name: Shelly's Cilantro Feta Dip
directions: OPTIONAL: Place feta and milk in bowl.
Cover and refrigerate overnight (8 hours).
This removes sodium content.
Drain and discard milk.
Process feta, cream cheese, sauce, cilantro and garlic in food processor until smooth.
Cover and refrigerate at least 30 minutes.
Serve with crackers, chips or veggies.

name: Nacho Cheese Pinwheels
directions: Spread each tortilla with about 2 tablespoons bean dip and 2 tablespoons cheese dip.
Sprinkle with onions.
Tightly roll up tortillas and wrap individually in plastic wrap.
Refrigerate at least 1 hour, but no longer than 24 hours.
(Storing the roll-ups too long results in soggy tortillas.).
To serve, cut off ends from each roll and discard.
Cut rolls into 1/2 to 3/4-inch slices.
Secure with toothpicks, if desired.

name: Chutney Cheese Ball
directions: Add the first 5 ingredients to the container of a food processor.
Process until well blended.
Lay a sheet of plastic wrap on a plate or line a bowl with it.
Transfer dip mixture to plastic wrap line plate or bowl.
Refrigerate for several hours.
Shape cheese mixture into a ball.
Put the chopped nuts on a piece of waxed paper.
Roll the cheese ball in the nuts; cover well.
Place cheese ball on a serving plate and arrange apple slices and/or crackers around the cheese ball.
Provide a small knife for spreading.

name: Bleu Cheese Dressing
directions: Mix all ingredients together and chill for about an hour.  Then its ready to serve!

name: Marinated Mozzarella
directions: Place cheese in a 1 quart jar.
Combine remaining ingredients in a small saucepan.
Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Remove from heat and cool 10 minutes.
Pour liquid over cheese in jar.
Refrigerate 1 to 2 weeks.

name: Cheese & Tortellini Kabobs
directions: Cook tortellini according to package directions; drain.
Place Italian dressing, ham, salami, red and green pepper in large plastic food bag. Tightly seal bag.
Turn bag over; place in 13x9-inch pan. Refrigerate, turning occasionally, for 2 to 3 hours; drain.
Thread tortellini, ham, salami, peppers and cheese on toothpicks.
